replication_study.hypothesis: Participants’ baseline perception of realistic COVID-19 threat (T1 mean of covid_real1–covid_real5) positively predicts their level of negative affect one week later (T2 summed negative1–negative10), after accounting for symbolic threat.

data_plan.source_type: Online panel survey (Prolific; PROLIFIC_PID present in data)
data_plan.wave_or_subset: Time 1 (earliest created record per participant) and Time 2 (first duplicate record within ≤8 days)
data_plan.sample_size: ≈348 unique participants (633 total records, 285 duplicated for T2)

qualification.explanation: The dataset provides a new independent panel of respondents measured on the same constructs (realistic threat, negative affect) at two time points, enabling a direct test of the focal longitudinal hypothesis.
qualification.similarity_to_original: Contains identical 5-item realistic threat scale (covid_real1-5) and PANAS negative affect items (negative1-10) used in the original study (see post_registration.json method description; Analysis.Rmd recodes identical items).
qualification.deviation_from_original: Original data were collected Mar-2020 on MTurk (post_registration.json data section); the replication data were collected Jan-2021 on Prolific (created timestamps and PROLIFIC_PID column), providing a later pandemic wave and a different participant pool.

data_plan.notes: Variables already coded 1–4/5; Analysis.Rmd shows scoring steps that will be adapted for /app/data paths.

planned_method.steps: 1. Load dataset. 2. Recoded scoring exactly as in Analysis.Rmd. 3. Identify T1 (earliest record) and T2 (next record within participant). 4. Compute Realistic_T1 = mean(covid_real1–5) at T1. 5. Compute Negative_T2 = sum(negative1–10) at T2. 6. Fit linear regression model: Negative_T2 ~ Realistic_T1 (+ Symbolic_T1 as covariate). 7. Extract coefficient, SE, t, p. 8. Compare sign/magnitude with original b = 4.02.
planned_method.outcome_variable: Negative_T2 (summed negative affect items at follow-up)
planned_method.tools_software: R (rio, dplyr, lavaan or lm), alternatively Python (pandas, statsmodels) if needed
planned_method.missing_data_handling: List-wise deletion on variables in model
planned_method.inference_criteria: Positive coefficient and p < 0.05 constitute support; magnitude compared with original 95% CI overlap.

files.replicate_analysis.R: Script derived from Analysis.Rmd; imports data from /app/data, scores variables, constructs wide dataset, fits regression, and saves results as /app/data/replication_results.csv
files.Analysis.Rmd: Original author’s notebook demonstrating scoring and SEM on example data; used as template.

codebase.notes: All paths altered to '/app/data'; dependencies limited to CRAN packages rio, dplyr, tidyr, lavaan or stats.

analysis.instructions: Run `Rscript replicate_analysis.R` inside the container. Script prints coefficient table and writes CSV of estimates.
analysis.comparison_metrics: Direction/sign, p-value, and ratio of replication coefficient to original (b_rep / 4.02); additionally 95% CI overlap indicator.
